creator: freebsd-bugs-local@be-well.ilk.org
text:
Thousands of people have downloaded and used that image since it was
released a few months back, so the official release image seems to be
okay.  There should be a checksum file in the same directory as the ISO
image; could you check against that?

It would be helpful to know where you downloaded the image from, and
what method you used to do so.
